metadata.sourceNotes: Antiparos first low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: GreeceVacationSearch places Theologos close/north of town with easy road access. In2Greece identifies Theologos/Camping beach on the north side of Antiparos next to the campsite and close to Chora, while AllTrails supports the Kaloudia-Theologos-Sifneiko walking cluster. Kept organized=false because direct organized-service evidence was weak.

metadata.sourceNotes: Antiparos second low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: GTP coordinates place this Livadi record on Despotiko island, which belongs to Antiparos community. Antiparos.com, Captain Sargos and In2Greece source-back Livadi as a silver-sand Despotiko beach reached by private boat or daily boat trips from Agios Georgios. Kept it app-facing as a boat-only Antiparos/Despotiko option rather than a main-island road beach.

sourceNotes: Antiparos final low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: Antiparos.com, AllOverGreece, GetGreece and Meravigliose Isole Greche source-back Faneromeni at the southern end of Antiparos by the Panagia Faneromeni chapel, with sandy/rocky terrain, difficult dirt-road access from Soros/Sostis, secluded character, and no organized-service evidence. Static shelter/wind-protection wording was not promoted as live-condition truth.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: Antiparos.com directly supports Faneromeni at the southern part of Antiparos, small sandy beach below the Faneromeni church, long rocky-road car access, alternate Tou Garbi to Avlaki naming, and no sunbeds/umbrellas/beach bar. Source calm/sheltered wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claims.
